items.title: S01E01 - Melt Down
items.summary: Schubert threatens to cause worldwide flooding by using powerful microwaves to melt Earth's polar ice caps, unless the government turns Mark Harris over to him.

infolabels.title: Melt Down
infolabels.plot: Schubert threatens to cause worldwide flooding by using powerful microwaves to melt Earth's polar ice caps, unless the government turns Mark Harris over to him.

items.title: S01E02 - The Mudworm
items.summary: When a multimillion-dollar underwater probe malfunctions and begins attacking any ship that travels near it, Mark must reason with its highly advanced brain and convince it to stop.

infolabels.title: The Mudworm
infolabels.plot: When a multimillion-dollar underwater probe malfunctions and begins attacking any ship that travels near it, Mark must reason with its highly advanced brain and convince it to stop.

items.title: S01E03 - The Hawk of Mu
items.summary: Mark, investigating a power outage, discovers a centuries-old hawk statue from the legendary civilization of Mu. The statue, when used properly, can remove the power from a large area. Schubert discovers the power of the hawk statue and Mark must prevent him from taking it.

infolabels.title: The Hawk of Mu
infolabels.plot: Mark, investigating a power outage, discovers a centuries-old hawk statue from the legendary civilization of Mu. The statue, when used properly, can remove the power from a large area. Schubert discovers the power of the hawk statue and Mark must prevent him from taking it.

items.title: S01E04 - Giant
items.summary: The oceans are leaking through a fissure in the ocean floor. A con-man named Muldoon agrees to guide Mark through the fissure to investigate. However, Mark is unaware either that giants inhabit the other side of the fissure or that Muldoon has already stolen gold from one of them.

infolabels.title: Giant
infolabels.plot: The oceans are leaking through a fissure in the ocean floor. A con-man named Muldoon agrees to guide Mark through the fissure to investigate. However, Mark is unaware either that giants inhabit the other side of the fissure or that Muldoon has already stolen gold from one of them.

items.title: S01E05 - Man O' War
items.summary: Using his genetic scientists, Schubert produces a giant jellyfish which he intends to release unless his extortion demands are met.

infolabels.title: Man O' War
infolabels.plot: Using his genetic scientists, Schubert produces a giant jellyfish which he intends to release unless his extortion demands are met.

items.title: S01E06 - Shoot-Out at Land's End
items.summary: Mark is somehow linked with a man named Billy, existing in a wild west town, who appears to be his twin. Investigating, Mark arrives in the town and discovers that Billy once had the same webbing as Mark, but also that he has had it removed.

infolabels.title: Shoot-Out at Land's End
infolabels.plot: Mark is somehow linked with a man named Billy, existing in a wild west town, who appears to be his twin. Investigating, Mark arrives in the town and discovers that Billy once had the same webbing as Mark, but also that he has had it removed.

items.title: S01E07 - Crystal Water, Sudden Death
items.summary: Schubert attempts to make a satellite weapon to knock out Earth's communications. However, to power the weapon, he needs the energy crystals protected by a force field under the ocean. The crystals actually power the force field that protects an underwater world inhabited by a humanoid society.

infolabels.title: Crystal Water, Sudden Death
infolabels.plot: Schubert attempts to make a satellite weapon to knock out Earth's communications. However, to power the weapon, he needs the energy crystals protected by a force field under the ocean. The crystals actually power the force field that protects an underwater world inhabited by a humanoid society.

items.title: S01E08 - The Naked Montague
items.summary: An underwater landslide transports Mark to Verona, Italy...in the days of Romeo and Juliet.

infolabels.title: The Naked Montague
infolabels.plot: An underwater landslide transports Mark to Verona, Italy...in the days of Romeo and Juliet.

items.title: S01E09 - C.W. Hyde
items.summary: C. W. develops a Jekyll-and-Hyde personality after swallowing a mysterious liquid.

infolabels.title: C.W. Hyde
infolabels.plot: C. W. develops a Jekyll-and-Hyde personality after swallowing a mysterious liquid.

items.title: S01E10 - Scavenger Hunt
items.summary: Mark re-encounters Muldoon, his nemesis from "Giant," who is using a sea monster to make island natives sacrifice young girls to him.

infolabels.title: Scavenger Hunt
infolabels.plot: Mark re-encounters Muldoon, his nemesis from "Giant," who is using a sea monster to make island natives sacrifice young girls to him.

items.title: S01E11 - Imp
items.summary: An impish little man enters an underwater station and causes the crew to become irrational simply by touching them. After three crewmen die, the F.F.O.R. hears Duke, the last crewman, talking over the radio in a childish manner and investigates. Mark swims over and brings Duke over to the Cetacean, not knowing the imp has stowed aboard.

infolabels.title: Imp
infolabels.plot: An impish little man enters an underwater station and causes the crew to become irrational simply by touching them. After three crewmen die, the F.F.O.R. hears Duke, the last crewman, talking over the radio in a childish manner and investigates. Mark swims over and brings Duke over to the Cetacean, not knowing the imp has stowed aboard.

items.title: S01E12 - The Siren
items.summary: While investigating the mysterious loss of three ships in one part of the ocean, Mark and the crew of the Cetacean encounter a submarine operated by a modern-day pirate. The pirate has captured a mermaid that can produce a hypnotic siren song, which mesmerizes anyone who hears it, even Mark.

infolabels.title: The Siren
infolabels.plot: While investigating the mysterious loss of three ships in one part of the ocean, Mark and the crew of the Cetacean encounter a submarine operated by a modern-day pirate. The pirate has captured a mermaid that can produce a hypnotic siren song, which mesmerizes anyone who hears it, even Mark.

items.title: S01E13 - Deadly Carnival
items.summary: Mark goes undercover to investigate members of a carnival planning to break into a museum. The only way to break into the museum is through an underwater tunnel, through which only Mark can swim. When he is approached, he refuses. The owner of the carnival is then kidnapped and threatened unless Mark helps.

infolabels.title: Deadly Carnival
infolabels.plot: Mark goes undercover to investigate members of a carnival planning to break into a museum. The only way to break into the museum is through an underwater tunnel, through which only Mark can swim. When he is approached, he refuses. The owner of the carnival is then kidnapped and threatened unless Mark helps.
